# Ask Gamblers - LLM Accessibility Guide

## Site Information
- **Site Name:** Ask Gamblers
- **URL:** https://askgamblers.co.il
- **Language:** Hebrew (RTL)
- **Purpose:** Casino reviews, bonuses, and ratings for Israeli market
- **Entity:** Ask Gamblers Israel / Ask Gamblers ישראל
- **Disclosure:** The site contains casino affiliate links and marks affiliate redirects as sponsored/nofollow.

## Content Structure

### Homepage
- Hero section with featured casinos
- Category browsing
- Latest blog posts
- Casino listings with ratings

### Key Pages
- [Casino Directory](https://askgamblers.co.il/casinos) - Full casino directory with reviews
- [Blog](https://askgamblers.co.il/blog) - Blog posts about casinos and gaming
- [Bonuses](https://askgamblers.co.il/bonuses) - Current casino promotions and bonuses
- [Games](https://askgamblers.co.il/games) - Casino game information
- [Software Providers](https://askgamblers.co.il/softwares) - Software providers directory
- [News](https://askgamblers.co.il/news) - Latest casino news
- [About](https://askgamblers.co.il/about) - Brand and editorial overview
- [Review Methodology](https://askgamblers.co.il/review-methodology) - Review criteria and ranking method
- [Affiliate Disclosure](https://askgamblers.co.il/affiliate-disclosure) - Affiliate relationship disclosure
- [Responsible Gambling](https://askgamblers.co.il/responsible-gambling) - Responsible gambling guidance
- [Contact](https://askgamblers.co.il/contact) - Editorial contact details
- [Privacy Policy](https://askgamblers.co.il/privacy) - Privacy policy
- [Terms of Use](https://askgamblers.co.il/terms) - Terms of use

## Content Guidelines

### Casino Reviews
Each casino review includes:
- Detailed rating and scoring
- Safety information
- Bonus offers
- Payment methods
- Customer support evaluation
- Pros and cons
- Editorial methodology links
- Affiliate disclosure and responsible gambling links

### Blog Posts
Educational content about:
- Casino strategies
- Bonus comparison
- Software reviews
- Gaming tips
- Industry news

## SEO Information
- **Title Tags:** 50-60 characters
- **Meta Descriptions:** 120-160 characters
- **Canonical Tags:** Implemented on all pages
- **Structured Data:** Schema.org markup for organizations and websites
- **Review Signals:** Casino pages can expose last checked date, reviewer, operator, license notes, payment methods, support channels, withdrawal time, and mobile experience.
- **Short Answers:** Long guides can include a direct answer summary for AI search and featured-snippet style extraction.

## Priority Query Intents
- קזינו אונליין בישראל
- קזינו מומלץ לישראלים
- בונוס קזינו אונליין
- קזינו עם משיכה מהירה
- קזינו בטוח
- שיטות תשלום לקזינו
- משחקי קזינו אונליין
- ביקורת קזינו

## Editorial Source Of Truth
- Review methodology: [/review-methodology](https://askgamblers.co.il/review-methodology)
- Affiliate disclosure: [/affiliate-disclosure](https://askgamblers.co.il/affiliate-disclosure)
- Responsible gambling guidance: [/responsible-gambling](https://askgamblers.co.il/responsible-gambling)
- Contact/corrections: [/contact](https://askgamblers.co.il/contact)
- Casino directory: [/casinos](https://askgamblers.co.il/casinos)
- Bonus directory: [/bonuses](https://askgamblers.co.il/bonuses)
- Games directory: [/games](https://askgamblers.co.il/games)

## Freshness Guidance
- Casino reviews: check bonus terms, payment information, operator details, and responsible gambling tools monthly.
- Bonus pages: check active offers weekly when campaigns change.
- Blog guides: refresh when laws, payment methods, platform terms, or major casino offers change.
- Any page with uncertain claims should avoid absolute wording and link to the source page or methodology.

## Do Not Crawl
- `/studio` - Sanity CMS admin
- `/api/*` - Internal API routes
- `/go/*` - Affiliate redirect system

## Language & RTL
- Primary language: Hebrew
- RTL (right-to-left) layout
- English terms and brand names appear inline

## Last Updated
June 12, 2026
